retrieval.query_summary: High-confluence bearish SMC setup on Crash 1000 Index, aligning with HTF trend after an LTF pullback.

factors.name: Macro bias alignment
factors.notes: Macro data not provided, treated as neutral/aligned per rules.

factors.name: HTF structure aligned
factors.notes: Exceptional alignment. D1, H12, H8, H6, H4, H1 are all confirmed bearish.

factors.name: MTF BOS or ChoCH confirmed
factors.notes: H6 candidate confirms both BMS and CHoCH bearishly. D1 also has a fresh BMS on the analysis day.

factors.name: Valid Structural Entry Support
factors.notes: High-quality H6 Order Block is perfectly nested within a larger unmitigated D1 Order Block.

factors.name: Liquidity sweep into entry zone
factors.notes: Clear Stop Hunt (SH) swept Buy-Side Liquidity (BSL) at 5690.149 before the structural break.

factors.name: COT alignment
factors.notes: COT data not available for this instrument.

factors.name: Wyckoff phase supports direction
factors.notes: The liquidity sweep and subsequent break of structure is characteristic of an Upthrust After Distribution (UTAD), initiating a Markdown phase.

factors.name: No high-impact news within 30 minutes
factors.notes: No high-impact news events were provided in the data.

factors.name: Minimum R:R achievable
factors.notes: Calculated R:R to final TP is ~4.15, which exceeds the 1:3 minimum for Intraday style.

cot_signal.summary: No COT data available for this instrument.

evidence.content_preview:
Valid Grade A or B SnD zone on 4H or above | MANDATORY | High |
| 5 | 4H Order Block or FVG at entry zone | MANDATORY | High |

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The analysis identifies a high-probability short opportunity on Crash 1000 Index, aligning with a strong, multi-timeframe bearish trend. The dominant structure from the Daily down to the H1 is bearish, with a fresh D1 BMS at 5511.148 today confirming institutional selling pressure. A recent LTF pullback has driven price into a premium supply area, where a high-confluence H6 SMC pattern (ID: b3289517) has formed at 2026-04-26 06:00Z. This SH+BMS+CHOCH+FVG+RTO setup originated from a liquidity sweep above the 5690.149 high, followed by a strong displacement downwards. The proposed entry is a return to the H6 Order Block between 5617.929 and 5658.427, which is nested within a larger, unmitigated D1 Order Block, adding significant conviction. The setup is further validated by a concurrent H3 QML+SR_FLIP+FAKEOUT+MARUBOZU pattern. With a confluence score of 9/10, this A+ grade setup offers a favorable R:R of 4.15 to the final target at the D1 swing low of 5357.275. A limit order is appropriate to await the return to the H6 OB.

htf_bias.notes: The higher timeframe structure is strongly bearish, with timeframes from D1 down to H1 showing aligned bearish trends. The D1 snapshot confirms a fresh Break of Market Structure (BMS) to the downside at 5511.148 on the day of analysis (2026-04-26), reinforcing the institutional order flow downwards.

mtf_bias.notes: Medium timeframes (H6, H4, H1) are aligned with the HTF bearish trend. A recent counter-trend pullback on LTFs (M30, M15) has pushed price into a premium area, mitigating an H6 supply zone. The formation of a high-quality H6 bearish SMC candidate suggests this pullback has culminated and price is ready to resume the HTF bearish trend.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup (beyond OB, beyond QML, beyond swing high/low)

stop_loss.reason: Placed above the H6 swing high at 5690.149 that performed the liquidity sweep, providing structural invalidation.

take_profits.basis: Recent structural low on the D1 timeframe, first area of potential support.
Significant swing low on the H1 timeframe, a clear liquidity pool.
Major D1 swing low, representing the primary draw on liquidity for the HTF bearish leg.

evidence.content_preview: Wyckoff: Spring/Upthrust entry within Accumulation/Distribution phase
